Friend, we’re just 3 days away from the biggest test our campaign has faced.

**It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. **

As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office.

But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do!

Isn't that a message you want to send loud and clear? I know I do, which is why I’m going to make this a little easier.

Every donation we get before the END-OF-YEAR deadline will be matched dollar for dollar. **That means a gift of $50, is really $100. **

[**Friend, that’s why I’m hoping I can count on you to chip in now.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=bc1ae210a7024445bbb563fe1e80deca&_e=DpBJsUn8Xw8L-jHuN6JDv8qZY3mioAXjFgluhtoSuT9_UnUg7AxsvwUCoOsf2E6AtVVX2XJHHOb3YmZ-Z6V_XlT4s7l1rgKV_Ish31YPhUDX9kvQur39gydrx9-SRZiU3-BHqdWbU3dj1n0EaCBljLwaVlW0phVUt_vIanfkHy0MLkusyGlDeVKisA0ZxI0miWozxk8J_fY2HePxEuZm9k8JnRB2ABYwHC-0EmObXxP_phgtWUtnYsGNmgCgeXuYlsnoX3lXezR9AwiaifJZhZT72gtm_d3hmpJIU80KXucWlz0Qw74NJpvGHag8YzY502wCa-pzXKh--0xSDXSHp8M_1b57IeGYUxYMgJ9xlxSkcuHPzrYxi_fsTUcclP94gPrhWGwIVoNSYVX2BxnLMQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of th Friend, we’re just 3 days away from the biggest test our campaign has faced. It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office. But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do! Isn't that a message you want to send loud and clear? I know I do, which is why I’m going to make this a little easier. Every donation we get before the END-OF-YEAR deadline will be matched dollar for dollar. That means a gift of $50, is really $100. I’m running for YOU because I believe that Wisconsin deserves better than what we’ve been getting. We deserve the American dream promised to us. We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change. But to do that, we have to raise that $18,500 before this deadline. If we don’t, we will be sending a message of surrender to the DC insiders. That’s something I just can’t stomach. Please, Friend, lets show them know we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation and start off 2018 with a huge bang. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Barbara Lee
subject: You can help Democrats win in 2018, Derek
body:
It's up to us to change course and get our country back on track.
---
Derek --

>From Harriet Tubman to Sojourner Truth to Shirley Chisholm to Coretta Scott King to Michelle Obama to Kamala Harris, Black women have been at the forefront of progress in this country from day one.

And if you look back to earlier this month in Alabama, you'll see a clear example of what happens when Democrats mobilize in our communities. _Ninety-eight percent_ of Black women who voted in that special Senate election voted for Doug Jones. Without them, Roy Moore would be a U.S. Senator.

While it's true that Black women support the Democratic Party in incredibly large numbers, it's also important that we bring people of all backgrounds into the fold. The only way Democrats can take back Congress in 2018 is if every single one of us gets involved.

**[Donate $10 before tomorrow's end-of-year fundraising deadline if you're ready to help Democrats organize nationwide in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523dd8/4067b0a/48a6f260b/7e5f1ba6/81726294/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Donate+10+before+tomorrows+endofyear+fun&utm_campaign=em_20171230_bl_v2s1&source=em_20171230_bl_v2s1&refcode=em_20171230_bl_v2s1")**

We can't take the support of Black women for granted. We have to listen to and empower these voices every single day -- not just when there's an election coming, but all of the time.

After all, that's what the Democratic Party is all about. We are the party that opens our doors to everyone and fights on behalf of all Americans, no matter where they live or what they look like.

Everything we do between now and Election Day will impact our ability to win back control of Congress. Let's make sure Democrats have the resources to organize and win.

**Chip in $10 ahead of tomorrow's end-of-year deadline to help Democrats get to work in every community, all across the country.**

To: Peter

Thank you for all that you are
doing to help.

Sincerely,

-John

name: Greg (personal)
subject: Goal update for Lynne
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
First of all, thank you for being a part of this fight for the Sixth District of Indiana. I also wanted to personally reach out to give you an update | |
---
Lynne,
First of all, thank you for being a part of this fight for the Sixth District of Indiana.

I also wanted to personally reach out to give you an update on our December FEC End of Year Deadline. We currently have 50 donors and are halfway to our goal.

I am appreciative of all the support we've gotten so far. Giving your hard earned money to this campaign means a lot to me and our team.

Our End-Of-Year goal is to receive 100 donations online from the Hoosier grassroots to show that we’re in this together.

I know we can achieve this goal because people want Hoosier values represented in D.C., and that’s what I’m fighting for. **I’m standing alongside President Trump because I want to Make America Great Again** – I want all Hoosiers to live their own personal American Dream.

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: It’s time…
body:
| | Help end 2017 strong so that, together, we can equip more Christians to vote their faith in 2018!
---
[ ](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171231apl05?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171230_apl_s1&n=1)
| The final countdown to the New Year has begun! I wanted to follow-up with you before we officially step into 2018 and hit the ground running. We already know 2018 is going to be a marathon to uphold Christian values in all 50 states across the country. Like you, I want to see every Christian who is eligible to vote in 2018 take a stand in the voting booth next year. [**It can happen if the work at My Faith Votes is supported by faithful patriots like you!**](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171231apl05?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171230_apl_s1&n=2) I’ve said it before, but the statistic still amazes me because it’s almost unheard of in politics – nearly 90% of Christians who used My Faith Votes voter assistant technology actually voted! When we unite and take a stand, we will see our communities, our states, and our nation transformed before our eyes to honor God! [**This mission won’t be accomplished without you. I’m asking you to stand with me now for 2018. Please give your best year-end gift now towards our $500,000 goal!**](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171231apl05?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171230_apl_s1&n=3) I look forward to all we will accomplish together as we seek the Lord and are faithful stewards of all he has entrusted us in America! Have a happy and blessed New Year! God Bless you. **United. We Stand.**

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171230_apl_s1&n=4) [ ](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171231apl05?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171230_apl_s1&n=5)
* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

body:
Our FINAL deadline of President Trump’s first year. |
---
| | | | | | | |

Friend,

Did you receive the President's end-of-year appeal?

When historians write about this presidency, they'll talk about the never-before-seen grassroots enthusiasm that led us to victory. And as we close our inaugural year, they'll look to see if we carried that same energy all the way to the end.

That's why -- as we make final push to make 2017 a truly historic year -- your year-end gift will be **DOUBLE MATCHED** before our **FINAL** FEC deadline.

**[Please make your contribution of just $1 ($3 with DOUBLE MATCH) before our FINAL FEC deadline of President Trump's first year in office.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=64f5829d3b0701b0e2ac36a0004f3929488b7927b47ff0aaadb95ecd64b08952c845edcb090ea941f64554b468e81781787d27ef60b3b7b7)**

**From:** Donald J. Trump

Friend,

If you listen to the media talk about 2017, they paint a VERY different picture than what I see when I travel the country and talk to the American people.

This is dangerous. And it's why we must stay vigilant in getting the truth out to the American people.

But there is one thing they cannot lie about: our NUMBERS. We are closing out the first year of our presidency -- yes, it is OUR presidency -- and I want to be sure we report an extraordinary year.

_As always, it is not about the size of your donation. It is the fact that you _PROVED_ you care about this cause so much that you actually stepped up and made a contribution. That is why we won, and why we will keep winning._

name: Chris Murphy
subject: I need your help to fight the gun lobby, Derek
body:
I am counting on you to help Democrats defeat gun lobby backed candidates in 2018.
---
Derek --

Nothing upsets me more than the sheer inability of Congress to have a serious debate about the epidemic of gun violence in this country.

You know the drill. After each mass shooting, members of Congress offer their thoughts and prayers. Yet time after time, there is no meaningful discussion of what we can actually do to stop the epidemic of gun violence in this country.

Here's the truth, Derek: will universal background checks, an assault weapons ban, fixing NICS, banning bump stocks and more stop every gun death? Of course not. But I shudder to think what it says about us as a nation if we don't even attempt to make a good faith effort to try and end this carnage.

So I am committed to electing more Democrats to Congress who are willing to act to save lives. But I cannot do it alone.

**Contribute $3 today to the Democratic National Committee -- before tomorrow's final FEC deadline of 2017 -- to elect Democrats who will prioritize the American people over the gun lobby.**

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0c9d/2861491941/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0c9a/2861491941/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0c9b/2861491941/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0c98/2861491941/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0c99/2861491941/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0ca6/2861491941/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")
We can never forget that this pace of carnage from mass shootings happens nowhere else but America. No other nation has to live through mass shooting after mass shooting like the United States.

The gun lobby has been very successful in numbing people to this epidemic and this slaughter. And right now, you can bet they are gearing up to defeat candidates who threaten their priorities in our next election.

That's why it's so important that we match their efforts with our own. I am counting on you to help Democrats defeat gun lobby backed candidates in 2018 -- are you in?

**Contribute $3 right now if you're ready to elect Democrats who will get to work on solving our country's epidemic of gun violence:**

**[http://my.democrats.org/Fight-the-Gun-Lobby](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ded/4067b0a/488ec1aeb/7e5f0ca7/2861491941/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-deadline-cm-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpmydemocratsorgFighttheGunLobby&utm_campaign=em_20171230_cm_nd&source=em_20171230_cm_nd&refcode=em_20171230_cm_nd")**

The vast majority of Americans want Congress to take action to make our communities safer from gun violence. It's about time we had the courage to do something about it.

Thanks for stepping up today to elect Democrats who aren't afraid to take on the gun lobby.

Chris Murphy
U.S. Senator, Connecticut

clean_body: I am counting on you to help Democrats defeat gun lobby backed candidates in 2018. Derek -- Nothing upsets me more than the sheer inability of Congress to have a serious debate about the epidemic of gun violence in this country. You know the drill. After each mass shooting, members of Congress offer their thoughts and prayers. Yet time after time, there is no meaningful discussion of what we can actually do to stop the epidemic of gun violence in this country. Here's the truth, Derek: will universal background checks, an assault weapons ban, fixing NICS, banning bump stocks and more stop every gun death? Of course not. But I shudder to think what it says about us as a nation if we don't even attempt to make a good faith effort to try and end this carnage. So I am committed to electing more Democrats to Congress who are willing to act to save lives. But I cannot do it alone. Contribute $3 today to the Democratic National Committee -- before tomorrow's final FEC deadline of 2017 -- to elect Democrats who will prioritize the American people over the gun lobby. "" "" "" "" "" "" We can never forget that this pace of carnage from mass shootings happens nowhere else but America. No other nation has to live through mass shooting after mass shooting like the United States. The gun lobby has been very successful in numbing people to this epidemic and this slaughter. And right now, you can bet they are gearing up to defeat candidates who threaten their priorities in our next election. That's why it's so important that we match their efforts with our own. I am counting on you to help Democrats defeat gun lobby backed candidates in 2018 -- are you in? Contribute $3 right now if you're ready to elect Democrats who will get to work on solving our country's epidemic of gun violence: "" The vast majority of Americans want Congress to take action to make our communities safer from gun violence. It's about time we had the courage to do something about it. Thanks for stepping up today to elect Democrats who aren't afraid to take on the gun lobby. Chris Murphy U.S. Senator, Connecticut Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: LegitAction Team
subject: Do more than react to Trump
disclaimer_text: paid for by LegitAction, Inc
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

How does change happen in this country? First, a few people start
talking about something. Then a few more join them. Then maybe someone
with a megaphone starts talking about it. And before you know it, what
once seemed like a dream now seems inevitable.

Right now, [ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4025?t=1002&akid=494%2E356062%2EPzVddP ]we’re part-way through that process on so many issues --
like in Florida, where Legit members have been working diligently to
help get an initiative on the state ballot to restore the ability to
vote to former felons who have paid their debt to society.

In part because of the hard work so many people have been putting into
this volunteer-led effort, celebrities like Lady Gaga are recognizing
the issue and adding their voices.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4025?t=1003&akid=494%2E356062%2EPzVddP ]1 in 4 Black Residents are ineligible to vote in Florida: here's
your chance to give 1.6 million people the ability to vote. Sign the
petition in person tonight at my show in Tampa or print it out & sign
here. We need to put voting rights on the ballot:

Now we have to make sure we get all the way through the process with
this voting restoration effort in Florida, and so many other issues.
And to do that, we have to meet our goal by tomorrow at midnight.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4025?t=1004&akid=494%2E356062%2EPzVddP ]Help raise the last $6,890 we need to hit our financial goal before
the year runs out tomorrow at midnight. Contribute
$3 now.

Here’s just a selection of the priorities we’re working on right now
that are somewhere between a crazy idea and a new law that rebuilds
legitimacy:

* Getting Connecticut, Oregon, and even more states to join the
National Popular Vote Interstate Compact so we can effectively end
the Electoral College
* Passing more state-level laws like the California DISCLOSE Act to
get dark money out of political campaigns
* Instituting automatic voter registration at the state and federal
levels to increase participation while making voter rolls more
accurate and reliable

If we complete the process and win on these issues, we’ll have a more
legitimate democracy as a result. If we don’t, all we’ll be able to do
is react to Trump’s latest daily outrage and watch as legislators keep
trying to cut taxes for the rich, repeal Obamacare, and more.

And THAT is why we need to reach this goal before midnight tomorrow.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4025?t=1005&akid=494%2E356062%2EPzVddP ]Contribute $3 to help
us reach our end-of-year financial goal before the clock strikes
midnight tomorrow.

Russ Feingold launched LegitAction in March because we cannot take our
democracy for granted -- we have to protect it and uphold its
legitimacy. And we can only continue our hard work with the support of
people like you.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

LegitAction Team

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: turning anger into action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Late at night while most of the country was asleep, every Republican member of the Senate voted to ram through one of the most regressive pieces of legislation I've seen in my life.

They passed a bill that will provide a massive windfall giveaway to President Trump and his billionaire buddies and increase our national debt by over a trillion dollars on the backs of millions of middle class Americans.

[**It was an outrageous process to behold. I was angry then -- and I still am now. But my resolution is to make sure the American people are fully aware of the implications of this GOP tax scam. And to channel that outrage into action -- to win Democratic majorities in the Senate and House. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b9f/70cdc2ba/46e14ac2/3902352/2397141637/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171230&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+It+was+an+outrageous+process+to+behold+I&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171230&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171230")

Not only will the tax scam further increase income inequality in America, but the Congressional Republicans' single-minded focus on this corporate giveaway pushed aside all other priorities.

We might have spent this fall working to address some of the many pressing needs in our country, including passing a long-term budget plan, providing funding for the Children's Health Insurance Program and community health centers and passing the DREAM Act. But instead, Congressional Republicans spent that time huddled behind closed-doors with an army of special interest lobbyists, crafting a corporate tax giveaway that is opposed by the overwhelming majority of this country.

[**Please help me fight back. Donate now before our critical End-Of-Year FEC deadline >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b9f/70cdc2ba/46e14ac2/3902353/2397141637/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171230&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+help+me+fight+back+Donate+now+bef&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171230&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171230")

There is an old saying "don't get mad, get even." We can do both. In the new year we must channel our outrage into action to fight back. As we saw in Alabama, Virginia, and elections across the country--every vote counts. The next best step we can take is to make sure Democrats win back the Senate and House in 2018!

Thank you for all that you do,

Chris Van Hollen

U.S. Senator

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: 2018 is the turning point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
We have a lot to look forward to in 2018. We will build off our victories in 2016 and 2017
#
Friends,
We have a lot to look forward to in 2018. We will build off our victories in 2016 and 2017 to make 2018 the turning point. In 2017, Our Revolution members led campaigns to make California the first sanctuary state in the Union. You kickstarted California's Medicare for All campaign with the National Nurses United to hold the Democratic supermajorities in the legislature accountable to the people, not health insurance and pharmaceutical lobbyists. You helped elect 44 progressive champions in 20 states to office from the school board to the state senate, and created more than 500 local chapters of Our Revolution spread across 49 states, Puerto Rico, and seven countries.
[**Chip in $5 right now before our end-of-year deadline. We need to do more than resist --your support helps us prepare for the 2018 midterm, local elections and the grassroots organizing that will propel us to victory.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adfa/bed43eb/3a01d426/75fe9464/672963311/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em171230-full&noskip=true")
Your contribution will be used to help Our Revolution organizers and volunteers with the materials and training necessary to prepare for full-time campaigns.
We know that the journey to reclaim democracy for working people will require a sense of purpose, planning, and perseverance. Continuing to harness the transformative energy of the political revolution will enable us to elevate the political consciousness, empower communities and elect progressive leaders on all levels of government.
**We need to work every day to sustain our grassroots momentum and build our capacity to take back offices next November.**
[**Please make a $5 contribution to Our Revolution and help us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal so that we can start 2018 strong.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adfa/bed43eb/3a01d426/75fe9464/672963311/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em171230-full&noskip=true")
Your time, talent and treasure have carried us through one of the toughest years in modern U.S. history. Thank you for everything, and I look forward to doing more great work together in the New Year.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

**It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. **

But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do!

We know it’s the holidays, and we kno Friend - We’re about to send Leah an update, but at the moment, it looks like you haven’t even opened up her email yet. We know it’s the holidays, and we know you’re spending time with family, but if we miss this deadline our campaign will be in trouble. To make it easy, we’re putting this back at the top of your inbox, and we’ll make it brief. We’re $11,235 short of our goal, and every donation for the next 24 hours will be matched dollar for dollar, Leah is counting on you, Team Leah < \- - - Begin forwarded message - - - > Friend, we’re just 3 days away from the biggest test our campaign has faced. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office. But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do! Isn't that a message you want to send loud and clear? We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change. But to do that, we have to raise that $18,500 before this deadline. If we don’t, we will be sending a message of surrender to the DC insiders. That’s something I just can’t stomach. Please, Friend, lets show them know we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation and start off 2018 with a huge bang. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf97/2a380d31/1517731/f1cbc4/2331863722/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf97/2a380d31/1517731/f1cbc4/2331863722/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
During her campaign, Senator Hassan pledged to Granite Staters and people across the country that she would take action to help ensure that money does not control our elections.
That's why she joined 45 of her colleagues in introducing the DISCLOSE Act of 2017, a bill that requires any organization that participates in political spending to disclose its major donors -- restoring accountability and making sure that voters know who is behind political advertising.
**The DISCLOSE Act is a major first step toward counteracting the devastating Citizens United decision and ensuring that a wealthy few (like Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers) don 't control our elections.**
Unfortunately, many Republicans in Congress are resistant to passing the DISCLOSE Act -- maybe because some of the major donors who bankroll their campaigns would be exposed for cutting million dollar checks to elect the candidates of their choosing.
Our political system needs more transparency, not less. That's why we're asking you to call on Congress to pass the DISCLOSE Act and let Americans see who is trying to buy their vote.**[Please, sign the petition now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf97/2a380d31/1517731/f1cbc5/2331863722/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/discloseact/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdiscloseact-up%3Frefcode%3D%25source%25")**
The 2018-midterm elections are just under a year away, and the Koch Brothers are already trying to buy elections for Republicans across the country.
Passing the DISCLOSE Act is the best way to hold the Kochs accountable for their bought-and-sold political influence, so we need you to speak out.
[**Please sign now to tell Congress to pass the DISCLOSE Act and restore transparency to our elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf97/2a380d31/1517731/f1cbc5/2331863722/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/discloseact/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdiscloseact-up%3Frefcode%3D%25source%25")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

2018 will be a defining year for our country.

We have a chance to defeat President Trump's destructive agenda and hateful brand of politics at the ballot box -- and nothing could be more important.

**And with Doug Jones ' victory in Alabama, we only need to flip two seats to take back the Senate majority.** But it's going to take each and every one of us fighting our hardest to get the job done.

**That 's where you come in. Our last FEC deadline of 2018 is at midnight tomorrow and we still have $163,278 left to raise.**
